text:
Perinatal Services for CCHP Members | Contra Costa Health
We're here to support you on your journey and help you access the care and resources you need to stay healthy!
At Contra Costa Health Plan (CCHP), we want to make sure you and your baby get the care you need. From the time you find out you are pregnant to after your baby is born, we are here to help. Learn about the different services and benefits you have during pregnancy and beyond.
Advice Nurse
Case Management
Doula Services
Healthy Start
Lactation Services
Public Health Programs
Transportation
Newsletter Sign-Up
Sign-up for our Maternal Health Newsletter to get news and updates in your inbox. You will get health education articles, upcoming community events, local resources, and more!
Subscribe to the Maternal Health Newsletter
